categories.name: Life Sciences & Molecular Discovery
categories.description: Research focused on biological systems, protein folding, genomics, and the development of new pharmaceuticals.
categories.not_here: General foundation models or physical materials discovery without biological application.

categories.name: Physical Sciences & Engineering
categories.description: Applications of AI in physics, chemistry, and materials science, including the modeling of physical laws and material properties.
categories.not_here: Biological molecules or purely linguistic scientific tools.

categories.name: Scientific NLP & Document Intelligence
categories.description: Tools and methods for processing, extracting, and understanding scientific text, charts, and figures.
categories.not_here: Autonomous agents that perform actions or general-purpose foundation models.

categories.name: Autonomous Agents & Research Workflow
categories.description: Systems designed to automate the scientific process, including coding, peer review, and laboratory experimentation.
categories.not_here: Static NLP analysis or manual benchmarking datasets.

categories.name: Scientific Foundation Models
categories.description: Development and architecture of large-scale models pre-trained specifically on scientific corpora for cross-domain utility.
categories.not_here: Specific applications of models to a single field like drug discovery.

categories.name: Benchmarks & Evaluation
categories.description: Standardized datasets and frameworks used to measure the performance of AI systems in scientific tasks.
categories.not_here: The introduction of new models or specific scientific discoveries.

categories.name: Ethics, Policy & Meta-Science
categories.description: Studies on the impact of AI on the scientific community, including ethics, bibliometrics, and the sociology of science.
categories.not_here: Technical implementations of AI models or software tools.

categories.name: Other
categories.description: Outlier papers that do not fit into the specific domains of life/physical sciences, automation, or scientific infrastructure.
categories.not_here: Any paper that can be reasonably mapped to the above seven categories.

assignments.title: Machine-Learned Interatomic Potentials for Predicting Physicochemical Properties of Molten Metal-Salt Systems for Calcium Electrolysis
MolQuest: A Benchmark for Agentic Evaluation of Abductive Reasoning in Chemical Structure Elucidation
Physics-Informed Neural Operator for Electromagnetic Inverse Scattering Problems
Incorporating Continuous Dependence Qualifies Physics-Informed Neural Networks for Operator Learning
Physics-informed neural network for multi-objective design optimization of wickless thermal ground planes
Automating Computational Chemistry Workflows via OpenClaw and Domain-Specific Skills
SEVerA: Verified Synthesis of Self-Evolving Agents
General-Purpose Machine-Learned Potential for CrCoNi Alloys Enabling Large-Scale Atomistic Simulations with First-Principles Accuracy
